station_code: Must match an existing station code in INMACOM database
unit: m³/s | m  (m³/s for discharge; m for stage/gauge height)
measurement_method: float_gauging | current_meter | ADCP | weir_formula | flume | remote_sensing | manual | estimated
gauge_height_m: Stage / gauge height in metres (if reporting discharge as value, enter gauge height here)
